summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SY Homes Prompt 1.2 (Users, Roles, Permissions). All 85 backend tests passed (32 auth/RBAC + 31 entities + 22 insurance alerts). Frontend login, navigation, Users/Roles/Permissions pages, entity scope filtering, and sensitive field stripping all working correctly.

minor.issue: Entity model was missing created_by_user_id column definition (migration had it but model didn't)

issues: Console warning: Cannot update a component while rendering a different component - minor React warning, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Auth flow working correctly: login returns JWT, /me returns 87 permissions for super_admin
Unauthenticated requests to protected endpoints return 401
10 roles seeded with correct permission counts (super_admin=87, director=84, project_manager=35, finance=29, read_only=7)
Entity scope filtering working: test-pm sees only Shrewsbury entity, test-director sees all 3
Sensitive field stripping working: test-readonly sees 'Restricted' placeholders for Banking/Xero sections
Role assignment with entity_scope='Specific' creates user_role + user_role_entities rows correctly
Logout clears session and redirects to login page
test_credentials: See /app/memory/test_credentials.md - test users use password TestUser-Dev-2026!, real super_admin is rhys@syhomes.co.uk
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/ (test_auth_rbac.py, test_entities_api.py, test_insurance_alerts.py). All tests require authentication - use test-admin@example.test with password TestUser-Dev-2026!. Entity model now has created_by_user_id field. Alembic migration 0002_users_rbac adds RBAC tables. Test users are idempotently seeded by seed_test_users.py.

backend_auth_rbac_tests: GET /api/auth/me with super_admin returns is_super_admin=true, 87 permissions ✓
GET /api/roles returns 10 seeded roles with correct permission counts ✓
GET /api/users with super_admin returns user list ✓
GET /api/users/{id} returns user detail with roles ✓
test-pm sees only Shrewsbury entity (scope filtering) ✓
test-readonly GET entity has bank_name=null (sensitive stripped) ✓
backend_entities_tests: All 31 Prompt 1.1 entity tests pass with authentication ✓
backend_insurance_tests: All 22 insurance alert sweep tests pass ✓
frontend_tests: AppShell shows current user email in topbar ✓
Logout button works and redirects to login ✓
Roles nav navigates to /roles, shows 10 roles ✓
Permissions nav shows 87 permissions grouped by resource ✓
Entity detail for readonly user shows 'Restricted' for Banking/Xero sections ✓
